summary: Frontend Playwright testing of Knight Households + Legio Titanicus flows on Empire of Ashes builder. Landing renders 22 active faction cards. Knight & Titan card → /armies?new=<id> → preselected Forge dialog → /builder/<id> all work and persist to localStorage 'eoa.armies.v1'. Conversion-flagged upgrades (titan-weapons-scout-4) correctly DO NOT add phantom unit rows. Iteration_9 crash regression is fixed — page loads with validation messages. Solar Auxilia Ogryn addedUnits regression works. Sons of Horus regression works. Two data discrepancies with review-request claims surfaced (see action_items) but UI matches the actual backend payload.

test_observations.cost_after_toggle_only_no_variant_picked: 500 pts (bundle = 0 pts, picks are 0 by default)
test_observations.crash_test_validation_panel_text_excerpt: validation-issue-upgrades-over-limit element present, upgrade-count shows '4 / 3 taken', body contains 'max 3 per Line detachment' and '4 upgrades'

action_items: DOC/CHANGELOG: review request and prior iteration_10 context claim quesetorius-lance baseCost = 425, but both backend factions.json and /api/factions/knight-household return 325 (UI also shows 325 — UI is correct, doc is stale). Note dominus-lance is the 425 formation.

DOC: review request says validation panel testid is 'army-validation-panel'; actual implementation uses data-testid='validation-panel' (with sub-testids validation-illegal, validation-issues, validation-issue-upgrades-over-limit). Update spec or rename for consistency.

EXPECTATION MISMATCH (not a bug): review expected weapon-conversion swap to add ~50 pts; actual implementation has 5 free variants (0 pts) + 2 premium variants (Melta Lance, Turbolaser Destructor) at +25 each. Selecting a free variant produces no cost delta (correct per data). If 50 pt deltas are desired, update variant costs in factions.json.

NOTE (informational only — not a P0): On a pure Titan/Knight LoW army, validation panel may flag 'no Line detachment'. As stated in review request this is expected and will be fixed in next P1 refactor.
critical_code_review_comments: FormationEditor.jsx line 53 + 64 correctly handle (faction.upgrades || []).find(...) defensive lookup — iteration_9 crash fix verified working.
FormationEditor.jsx line 76 'if (upDef.conversion) return;' correctly short-circuits roster-row injection for weapon-conv upgrades — verified: 1 unit row shown for Warhound after weapon-conv toggled.
FormationEditor.jsx merges addedUnits from flag upgrades into unitCounts Map (line 67-72) — Ogryn / Rapier / Snipers stat rows appear correctly.
Builder.jsx auto-saves on every state change via useEffect — confirmed localStorage stays in sync.
Landing.jsx uses pure <Link to="/armies?new="> for faction selection — clean deep-link pattern.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app, localStorage-only MVP.
seed_data_creation: Test data created via localStorage only (TEST_Knight_Force, TEST_Titan_Force, TEST_SA_*, TEST_TT_*, TEST_SoH, TEST_SoH2, and crash-test army 'x'). All data is browser-local and cleared on browser data wipe.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Knights + Titans + crash-fix flows pass. Two doc-level discrepancies should be reconciled by main agent: (a) quesetorius-lance is 325 not 425 (changelog stale; dominus-lance = 425), (b) validation panel data-testid is 'validation-panel' not 'army-validation-panel'. Conversion-flagged upgrades behave correctly (no phantom unit rows). Premium weapon variants are +25, not +50.
rca_of_the_issue: No bugs found. Two stale doc/spec references were uncovered. Backend payload, UI cost calc (lib/points.js), and FormationEditor render are all internally consistent.
